name: Organic Premium Quinoa (1kg)
description: Sustainably sourced, pre-washed organic white quinoa grains. Packed with plant-based protein, fiber, and essential amino acids.

name: Cold-Pressed Virgin Olive Oil (500ml)
description: Premium extra virgin olive oil cold-pressed from selected Mediterranean olives. Perfect for salads, dressings, and light cooking.

name: Himalayan Pink Salt (Coarse, 500g)
description: 100% natural, unrefined mineral-rich pink salt crystals mined from deep within the Himalayas. Adds delicate flavor to any dish.

name: Organic Raw Forest Honey (250g)
description: Pure, unfiltered honey harvested from wild hives in protected forest reserves. Rich in natural enzymes and antioxidants.

name: Gluten-Free Whole Grain Rolled Oats (1kg)
description: Premium quality rolled oats processed in a certified gluten-free facility. An ideal energy-boosting high-fiber breakfast option.

name: Artisanal Matcha Green Tea Powder (50g)
description: Ceremonial grade Japanese matcha green tea powder, stone-ground to preserve its vivid green hue and rich umami flavor.

name: Single-Origin Arabica Coffee Roast (250g)
description: Medium-roast Arabica coffee beans ethically sourced from high-altitude farms in Colombia. Notes of caramel, hazelnut, and citrus.

name: Sparkling Elderflower Botanical Water (330ml)
description: Refreshingly light carbonated spring water infused with organic elderflower blossoms and a splash of fresh lemon juice.

name: Organic Peppermint Herbal Infusion (25 Bags)
description: Soothing, caffeine-free herbal tea bags crafted from premium peppermint leaves. Enjoy hot or iced for a refreshing digestif.

name: Slow-Roasted California Almonds (200g)
description: Premium quality almonds dry-roasted to a golden crisp and lightly seasoned with pure sea salt for a healthy crunch.

name: 70% Dark Chocolate Quinoa Crisps (120g)
description: Puffed organic quinoa seeds coated in rich, velvety 70% dark Belgian chocolate. A delightful sweet and crunchy combination.

name: Gourmet Aged White Cheddar Popcorn (80g)
description: Fluffy air-popped butterfly popcorn tossed in micro-ground premium white cheddar cheese seasoning. Zero trans fats.

name: Organic Air-Dried Beetroot Crisps (60g)
description: Crisp and earthy beetroot slices slow-baked with a touch of organic cold-pressed olive oil and Himalayan salt.

name: Fresh Organic Royal Gala Apples (4 Pack)
description: Sweet, crisp, and orchard-fresh red Royal Gala apples. Sourced from certified organic growers, rich in dietary fiber.

name: Organic Sweet Cavendish Bananas (Bunch of 6)
description: Naturally ripened sweet bananas with an excellent creamy texture. High in potassium and perfect for quick energy.

name: Fresh Wild Blueberries (125g Punnet)
description: Plump, juicy, and sweet blueberries loaded with vitamin C and vital antioxidants. Hand-picked at optimal ripeness.

name: Sweet Honey Gold Mangoes (Pack of 2)
description: Exquisite honey gold mangoes, famous for their rich sweet nectar, fiberless flesh, and intense tropical aroma.

name: Organic Red Cherry Tomatoes (250g)
description: Vibrant and sweet vine-ripened cherry tomatoes. Bursting with fresh, tangy flavor, perfect for salads and pan-searing.

name: Fresh Hydroponic English Cucumbers (2 Pack)
description: Crisp and hydrating seedless English cucumbers grown using advanced vertical hydroponics. Ideal for cooling summer salads.

name: Tender Organic Baby Spinach (150g)
description: Pre-washed, tender organic baby spinach leaves. Cultivated without chemical pesticides, rich in iron and folate.

name: Fresh Crowns of Green Broccoli (400g)
description: Crisp green broccoli crowns with tight florets, packed with essential vitamins, minerals, and prebiotic fibers.

name: Artisanal Grass-Fed Butter (200g)
description: Rich, velvety butter churned from the cream of grass-fed cows. Lightly salted with mineral-rich sea salt.

name: Organic Whole Jersey Milk (1L)
description: Freshly pasteurized, non-homogenized whole milk sourced from purebred Jersey cows. Exceptional creamy taste.

name: Strained Authentic Greek Yogurt (Plain, 500g)
description: Ultra-thick and creamy Greek yogurt, triple-strained to maximize protein content. Contains live active cultures.

name: Aged English White Cheddar Cheese (250g)
description: Sharp white cheddar cheese blocks aged for 12 months in temperature-controlled caves. Deep, mature flavor.

name: Hydrating Aloe Vera Foam Face Wash (150ml)
description: Sulfate-free face wash enriched with 95% pure aloe vera and green tea extract. Cleanses gently without stripping moisture.

name: Organic Cold-Pressed Argan Hair Elixir (100ml)
description: Lightweight, non-greasy hair serum infused with Moroccan argan oil. Controls frizz and restores natural gloss.

name: Raw Shea Butter Body Soufflé (200ml)
description: Intensely hydrating body whipped lotion formulated with raw African shea butter and restorative vitamin E.

name: Activated Bamboo Charcoal Toothpaste (100g)
description: All-natural whitening toothpaste crafted with active coconut shell charcoal and organic spearmint leaf oil.

name: Lavender Soy Wax Aromatherapy Candle
description: Hand-poured soy wax candle infused with therapeutic-grade French lavender essential oil. Provides 45 hours of calm.

name: Organic Bamboo Fiber Bath Towel
description: Plush, extra-soft bath towel woven from a high-performance blend of organic bamboo and long-staple Turkish cotton.

name: Minimalist Matte Ceramic Vase
description: Stunning ceramic vase featuring an architectural silhouette and a subtle sand-textured finish. Elevates any room.

name: Intelligent LED Reading Desk Lamp
description: Adjustable desk lamp with flicker-free warm white light, touch-sensitive dimming, and USB charging outlet.

name: Citrus Peel Multi-Surface Spray (500ml)
description: Tough-acting, plant-based surface cleaner spray powered by orange oil terpenes. Leaves a crisp citrus fragrance.

name: Aloe Concentrated Liquid Dish Soap (500ml)
description: Biodegradable dish soap that easily cuts through grease while keeping hands soft with soothing aloe extracts.

name: Concentrated Eucalyptus Laundry Liquid (1L)
description: Hypoallergenic laundry detergent formulated with plant-derived cleaning enzymes and pure eucalyptus extract.

name: Coconut Fiber Eco-Scrub Sponges (3 Pack)
description: Plastic-free dishwashing sponges made with a combination of coconut coir fiber and natural cellulose pulp.

name: Insulated Stainless Steel Flask (1L)
description: Double-walled vacuum insulated flask keeping fluids icy cold for 24 hours or steaming hot for up to 12 hours.

name: Pre-Seasoned Cast Iron Skillet (10 inch)
description: Heavy-duty cast iron pan providing unmatched thermal retention. Pre-seasoned with natural vegetable oils.

name: Premium Organic Bamboo Chopping Board
description: Durable and aesthetic kitchen chopping block crafted from renewable organic bamboo. Features juice runoff grooves.

name: Borosilicate Glass Carafe French Press (600ml)
description: Elegant French press with heat-resistant borosilicate glass and a double-mesh stainless steel filter plunge.

name: Double-Braided Nylon USB-C Cable (2m)
description: Heavy-duty charging cable with reinforced connectors. Supports up to 60W power delivery and 480Mbps transfer.

name: MagSafe Fast Wireless Charger Pad
description: Ultra-slim wireless charging pad equipped with strong magnetic alignment and advanced temperature controls.

name: True Wireless Active Noise Cancelling Earbuds
description: Immersive Bluetooth 5.2 earbuds featuring active noise cancellation, custom audio drivers, and IPX7 rating.

name: Ergonomic Gel Wrist Mouse Pad
description: Non-slip rubber base mouse pad with an integrated gel pillow that conforms to your wrist for typing comfort.

name: Organic Ashwagandha Adaptogen (60 Capsules)
description: USDA organic ashwagandha root extract combined with black pepper extract to maximize cellular absorption.

name: Organic Vanilla Plant-Based Protein (1kg)
description: Premium allergen-free protein powder extracted from peas, brown rice, and chia seeds. Naturally sweetened.

name: Cold-Pressed Ginger Turmeric Shots (6 Pack)
description: Concentrated daily shots made with cold-pressed ginger root, fresh turmeric, black pepper, and lemon juice.

name: Fresh Fruits & Vegetables
description: Enjoy premium-quality fruits and vegetables, carefully selected to keep your meals fresh, healthy, and delicious..

name: Fortune Sunflower Oil (1L)
description: Refined sunflower oil suitable for daily cooking.

name: Fresh Farm Eggs (12 Pieces)
description: Fresh farm eggs rich in protein and essential nutrients.

name: Fresh Potatoes (1kg)
description: Farm-fresh potatoes suitable for all cooking needs.

description: Fresh red onions sourced directly from farmers.

name: Coca-Cola Soft Drink (2L)
description: Refreshing carbonated soft drink for every occasion.

name: Maggi Instant Noodles Pack
description: India's favorite instant noodles ready in 2 minutes.

description: Slip-resistant, high-density yoga mat crafted from non-toxic biodegradable TPE. Alignment guidelines included.

description: 100% pure, steam-distilled eucalyptus globulus oil. Ideal for aromatic diffusers, spa sessions, and breathing comfort.

name: Allen Solly Men's Premium Cotton Formal Shirt
description: A crisp, premium formal shirt crafted from 100% long-staple cotton. Featuring a sharp cutaway collar and modern fit, perfect for business meetings.

name: U.S. Polo Assn. Classic Fit Oxford Shirt
description: The quintessential button-down Oxford shirt with signature polo player embroidery. Made from breathable heavy cotton fabric that softens with age.

name: Peter England Slim Fit Linen Blend Shirt
description: Keep cool and look sharp with this premium linen-cotton blend shirt. Styled in a tailored slim fit with a soft collar and curved hem.

name: Louis Philippe Textured Cotton Formal Shirt
description: Add sophistication to your corporate wardrobe with this subtle self-textured shirt. Tailored using double-ply cotton with a sleek French placket.

name: Van Heusen Solid Satin Giza Cotton Shirt
description: Crafted from rare Giza cotton with a smooth satin finish, this shirt offers a subtle sheen and ultra-soft feel for evening celebrations.

name: Jack & Jones Printed Casual Resort Shirt
description: A relaxed-fit camp collar casual shirt featuring a vibrant botanical print. Crafted from lightweight, eco-friendly viscose fabric.

name: Levi's Sunset Pocket Chambray Shirt
description: Inspired by heritage workwear, this chambray shirt features double-needle stitching, chest spade pockets, and a timeless relaxed fit.

name: Roadster Distressed Denim Casual Shirt
description: An authentic rugged denim shirt featuring a washed finish, snap-button closures, and patch pockets for an effortless outdoor aesthetic.

name: H&M Premium Supima Cotton T-Shirt
description: Fitted crewneck t-shirt made of extra-soft, long-staple Supima cotton for superior drape, color retention, and pill resistance.

name: Nike Dri-FIT Legend Athletic Tee
description: High-performance training t-shirt built with moisture-wicking Dri-FIT technology. Flat seams prevent chafing during heavy workouts.

name: Adidas Aeroready Tech Fit T-Shirt
description: An athletic tee made with recycled Ocean Plastic and breathable Aeroready fabric. Designed with underarm mesh panels for ventilation.

name: Puma Archive No.1 Logo Tee
description: A retro-inspired regular fit t-shirt featuring the classic Puma Archive metallic logo. Soft cotton knit guarantees daily comfort.

name: U.S. Polo Assn. Classic Striped Polo T-Shirt
description: Signature pique-knit polo shirt featuring bold horizontal stripes, a ribbed collar, and double-button placket. Embroidered insignia.

name: Jack & Jones Graphic Logo Streetwear Tee
description: Urban style oversized crewneck t-shirt featuring a modern abstract print on the back. Crafted from heavy cotton jersey fabric.

name: Levi's Original Housemark Crewneck Tee
description: Clean and simple crewneck tee displaying the small classic batwing logo. A versatile styling base layer for jackets.

name: Roadster Acid Wash Knit Pocket Tee
description: Soft cotton knit tee treated with an industrial acid wash to create a unique faded, vintage look. Features a single chest patch pocket.

name: Levi's 511 Slim Fit Stretch Jeans
description: The classic modern slim-fit jeans. Cut close to the body with built-in advanced stretch denim to provide supreme range of motion.

name: Wrangler Rugged Wear Relaxed Bootcut Jeans
description: Durable heavyweight ring-spun cotton denim jeans. Built in a comfortable relaxed fit through the seat and thighs, with a slight bootcut leg opening.

name: Lee Cooper Straight Fit Vintage Wash Jeans
description: Mid-rise straight fit jeans displaying clean whiskering and sanding details. Crafted from soft, breathable cotton-stretch blend.

name: Jack & Jones Glenn Slim Tapered Jeans
description: Modern slim tapered fit jeans with subtle ripped knees and detailed wash. Made using sustainable indigo dye processing.

name: Roadster Straight Fit Light Wash Jeans
description: Skinny fit jeans crafted from highly elastic stretch denim. Finished with standard 5-pocket styling and light blue wash.

name: H&M Tapered Regular Crop Jeans
description: Rigid cotton denim jeans tailored in a regular fit with tapered legs and cropped raw-edge hems. Adds instant casual vibe.

name: Adidas Originals Trefoil Heavyweight Hoodie
description: Thick premium French terry hoodie displaying the bold Adidas trefoil embroidery across the chest. Ribbed side panels allow free motion.

name: Puma Sportstyle Fleece Pullover Hoodie
description: Ultra-soft brushed fleece lining provides outstanding warmth. Designed with an adjustable drawstring hood and large kangaroo storage pocket.

name: Nike Club Fleece Brushed-Back Hoodie
description: An absolute streetwear staple. Standard fit hoodie crafted from brushed-back fleece for a soft, smooth face and cozy interior warmth.

name: Jack & Jones Core Utility Pocket Hoodie
description: Casual streetwear hoodie with zipped cargo utility sleeve pockets. Double-lined hood prevents chill wind drafts.

name: H&M Relaxed Fit French Terry Hoodie
description: Relaxed fit pullover hoodie in pure cotton French terry fabric. Designed with dropped shoulders and thick ribbing details.

name: Roadster Hooded Sweatshirt
description: Stylish colorblocked hoodie crafted from soft cotton-poly fleece. Features contrast drawstring hood and ribbed cuffs.

name: Nike Air Zoom Pegasus Road Running Shoes
description: Premium road running shoes featuring high-rebound Zoom Air cushioning. Engineered breathable mesh upper keeps feet dry.

name: Adidas Ultraboost Light Performance Shoes
description: Ultralight performance running shoes utilizing Boost midsole capsules. Seamless Primeknit upper wraps feet in support.

name: Puma Slipstream Retro Leather Sneakers
description: Classic 80s basketball sneaker silhouette updated with premium full-grain leather overlays and comfortable rubber cupsole.

name: Reebok Club C 85 Vintage Court Sneakers
description: Timeless tennis-court inspired sneakers featuring clean chalk leather, retro terry cloth lining, and lightweight EVA midsole.

name: Skechers Arch Fit Max Cushioning Shoes
description: Podiatrist-certified arch support walking shoes. Featuring an air-cooled memory foam insole and highly shock-absorbing max sole.

name: Puma Wired Run Slip-On Sneakers
description: Convenient slip-on structure featuring breathable sandwich mesh and an elastic strap across the midfoot for lockdown support.

name: Casio G-Shock Rugged Sport Watch
description: Shock-resistant resin case analog-digital watch featuring 200m water resistance, automatic LED calendar, and 5 daily alarms.

name: Titan Neo Analog Blue Dial Dress Watch
description: Classic stainless steel case watch with a deep ocean blue dial and premium genuine brown leather strap. Quartz accuracy.

name: Fossil Gen 6 Hybrid Smart Watch
description: E-ink monochrome display hybrid smartwatch. Delivers 2-week battery life, heart-rate tracking, sleep insights, and message previews.

name: Fastrack Minimalist Casual Quartz Watch
description: Trendy youth watch featuring a lightweight matte black metal case, sleek numeric dials, and flexible sweat-proof silicone strap.

name: Casio Vintage Digital Steel Band Watch
description: Iconic vintage digital display watch featuring a brushed steel link band, stopwatch function, hourly chime, and electro-luminescent backlight.

name: Fossil Grant Chronograph Leather Watch
description: Timeless Roman numeral dial chronograph watch with durable gunmetal case and rich black leather strap. Perfect for formal occasions.
